The '''Rodian cryogen whip''' was a close-range weapon manufactured by [[Sancretti Arms & Munitions, Interstellar]] which was favored in the underworld. [[Cryogen]] at a temperature of absolute zero flowed through the whip, making it extra painful on impact.

{{Weapon-stub}}
